allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $files = @\('c:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\chatbot\\neba_web\\public\\assets\\images\\bracelets\\pesvi\\1 \(1\).jpg','c:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\chatbot\\neba_web\\public\\assets\\images\\bracelets\\pesvi\\1 \(2\).jpg','c:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\chatbot\\neba_web\\public\\assets\\images\\bracelets\\mcveli\\1 \(1\).jpg','c:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\chatbot\\neba_web\\public\\assets\\images\\mtis-kvali\\1 \(1\).jpg','c:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\chatbot\\neba_web\\public\\assets\\images\\bracelets\\mtis-kvali\\1 \(1\).jpg'\); foreach \($f in $files\) { if \(Test-Path $f\) { try { $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($f\); Write-Host \("{0} => {1}x{2} ratio={3:N2}" -f \(Split-Path $f -Leaf\), $img.Width, $img.Height, \($img.Width/$img.Height\)\); $img.Dispose\(\) } catch { Write-Host "ERR: $f"} } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "public\\assets\\images\\bracelets" -Recurse -File | Select-Object FullName, Length | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{ Path = $_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path + "\\", ""\); SizeKB = [math]::Round\($_.Length / 1KB, 1\) } } | Format-Table -AutoSize)
